stories.headline: John Healey wanted UK to join global investment bank to raise defence funds
stories.description: Allies of the former defence secretary claim the Treasury tried to shut down the idea.

stories.headline: Boy, 14, among arrests after man stabbed in Chelmsford
stories.description: Essex Police say three teenagers are being questioned on suspicion of murder.

stories.headline: Linkin Park to make Download Festival history
stories.description: Linkin Park will make history as the first female-fronted band to headline Download Festival.

stories.headline: Switzerland to vote on plan to cap population at 10 million
stories.description: The right-wing Swiss People's Party calls the plan a "sustainability initiative",  but opponents say...

stories.headline: Bootle shopworker sacked for tackling suspected bacon thief
stories.description: Eileen Fox had worked at the One Stop Shop in Bootle for four years before she was sacked.
